Boosts CRT damage by 20%.
Equip on guest party member Aegiomon to begin battles as
Aegiochusmon.

Boosts effects of HP recovery by 50% when in battle.

A depleted battery.
The standard type commonly found in the factory.

A type of seaweed often called the "medicinal herb of the sea."
Can be used as a salve.

A large shell received from Shellmon.
Used for summoning Whamon.

A precious gift from Kamemon.
Can be used as a medicinal ingredient.

Fruit from Karpos Hulē, a forest famed for producing the sweetest
fruit in the Digital World.

A ticket for Kokuwamon Park, good for everything from entry to
attractions and guidance from Guardromon!

A lifetime passport ticket for everything in Kokuwamon Park.
An endless world of fun awaits!
A special repair tool for the electromagnetic net generator.

A fuse used in the Digital World.
Use it to fix Kokuwamon.

A small bottle from MarineAngemon, adorned with fancy hearts
and ribbons. The cap is surprisingly secure, and no liquid would
ever leak out.

A ring handmade by Neptunemon. It is made of a hard metal native
to the ocean floor and features a stone of Blue Chrondigizoit Metal.

A medicine that is the culmination of Venusmon's research. Its
strong recovery effect sometimes even promotes growth. Its
ingredients are difficult to collect, and it cannot be mass-produced.

A feather that fell off of Parrotmon.
This battered plume conjures up images of fierce battles.
A keycard that opens the doors of the factory.

Precious jewelry that is one of PlatinumNumemon's most splendid
accessories. It carries this jewelry inside its own body with great
care.
A common aquatic plant that is often found in the sea.

A somewhat uncommon aquatic plant. Rumor has it that finding
this plant may bring good luck with love.

A somewhat uncommon aquatic plant. Rumor has it that finding
this plant may bring good luck with money.

A rare aquatic plant that reacts to the quality of water. Originally
blue, it turns purple when the quality of the surrounding water
deteriorates.

A fruit long rumored to energize those who eat it. No evidence to
support these claims of medicinal proprties exists, but some
say its effects are subjective.
The smelted product of Chrondigizoit ore obtained from mining.

An industrial cooler for powerful space cooling.
It can withstand harsh environments such as blast furnaces.

Heats a space with warm air. Although it's a slightly older model,
it boasts one of the best heating capabilities for home use.

A large amount of mixed metals of varying composition.
It is strong and can be used as a material as is.

Parts from the elbow to the fingertips of some action figure.
The fingers are shaped as though they are picking something up,
and, if you look closely, there are snack crumbs stuck to them.

An action figure with fully movable joints. All the typical poses
from the Sayori the Cutie Magician series can be reproduced.
A scarf received as a keepsake from Neptunemon.
A bottle of wine received as a keepsake from Venusmon.
An odd variety of seed that gives off heat.
An odd variety of seed that gives off a chill.
A storage device containing a recovery supervisor ID.
A laboratory ID received from Dr. Simmons.
A special battery devised by Vulcanusmon.
A special battery devised by Vulcanusmon.
An item dropped by something that resembles Hiroko.
An item dropped by Etemon.
An item dropped by Kuramon.

A rare Jogmon card with nothing on it.
Something may happen if you give it to someone familiar with
cards.
